# Medical Debt in Bankruptcy - Discharge Guide [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Medical bills are fully dischargeable in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy. Learn eligibility, process, and alternatives. 2026 guide.

## About
medicaldebtbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Exemptions and Medical Assets - Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/bankruptcy-exemptions.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy for Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/chapter-13-medical-debt.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy for Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/chapter-7-medical-debt.html
- Medical Debt Credit Reporting Changes: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/credit-reporting-changes.html
- Medical Debt Bankruptcy FAQ - Discharge Medical Bills: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/frequently-asked-questions.html
- Hospital Charity Care Programs - Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/hospital-charity-care.html
- Medical Debt in Bankruptcy - Discharge Guide: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/
- Life After Medical Debt Discharge: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/life-after-discharge.html
- When Hospitals and Collectors Sue for Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/medical-debt-lawsuits.html
- Medical Debt Options Compared - Negotiation, Charity Care, Bankruptcy: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/medical-debt-options.html
- Negotiating Medical Bills - Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/negotiating-medical-bills.html
- The No Surprises Act - Medical Debt: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/no-surprises-act.html
- Privacy Policy: https://medicaldebtbankruptcy.com/privacy.html

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
